hero.subtitle: We are a shelter in Mafra/Ericeira, Portugal. Meet our animals and give one a forever home.

ourStory.title: How Ericeira Paws began
ourStory.body: Ericeira Paws started as one person's project — a love for animals and a wish to help the dogs and cats living in cages at the Mafra shelter. It grew through a meeting with Patrícia, a local who would do anything for them, and a team of volunteers who now show up three times a week. Today that team walks the dogs, feeds them better, and gives them something the shelter can't — attention. There's room for you in it.

instagram.title: Follow our story
instagram.subtitle: Every week we share updates from the shelter — new arrivals, walks, adoptions, and the dogs you'll fall in love with.

donateSection.title: Every bit changes their week.
donateSection.copy: The Mafra shelter houses around 50 animals with limited resources. Our volunteers give each one outdoor time, better food, and something they don't get enough of — attention.
donateSection.bullet1: €20 — a month of quality food — for one dog
donateSection.bullet2: €50 — a vet check-up — for a dog in foster care
donateSection.bullet3: €10 — vitamins and supplements — for a week

foster.eyebrow: Give them a break from the shelter
foster.title: Foster with Ericeira Paws
foster.subtitle: Open your home temporarily — even a few weeks gets a dog out of a cage.

whatItMeans.title: A temporary home changes everything.
whatItMeans.body: Fostering means taking an animal into your home for a few weeks or a few months. You give them space to breathe, a normal life, and time away from the shelter. Even a short stay makes a real difference — and often leads to a permanent home.
whatItMeans.transientTitle: You don't have to stay forever.
whatItMeans.transientBody: Fostering is designed for people who can't commit to adoption — digital nomads, expats between leases, people who aren't sure yet. Three months in Ericeira and want to give something back? That's exactly what fostering is for.
whatItMeans.durationValue: Weeks to months — flexible to your situation
whatItMeans.costValue: You cover food, basics, and vet care during the stay
whatItMeans.supportValue: We're with you the whole time — advice, vet coordination, and what comes next

howItWorks.title: Three steps.
howItWorks.step1Note: Tell us about yourself, your home, and your timeline
howItWorks.step2Note: The team pairs you with an animal that suits your situation
howItWorks.step3Note: Bring them home for a few weeks or months — we're with you the whole way

form.title: Get in touch.
form.subtitle: Tell us a bit about yourself and your situation. We'll find the right match together.
form.defaultMessage: Hi, I'm interested in fostering one of your dogs. Here's a bit about my situation:
form.name: Your name
form.success: Message sent. We'll be in touch soon.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
form.tip1: Where you live — apartment or house, do you have outdoor space?
form.tip2: How long you're available to foster

form.tip4: Any experience with dogs — shelter, foster, or your own
